entry.title: lissy93 commented on an issue in dashy
entry.content:
lissy93 commented on lissy93/dashy#2244 · July 17, 2026 06:34
lissy93 commented Jul 17, 2026
The COPY --chown=node:node in the Dockerfile sets the correct ownership inside the image. But when you mount a host directory as a volume (e.g. `-v…
